data.description: Some characters might prefer to spend their time away from civilization, sustaining themselves in the wild by hunting, foraging, and repairing their own gear. Maintaining this kind of lifestyle doesn't require you to spend any coin, but it is time-consuming.

Skilled hirelings include anyone hired to perform a service involving proficiency (including weapon, tool, skill): mercenary, artisan, scribe, and so on. The shown is a minimum; expert hirelings some pay more Untrained hirelings are hired for menial work that requires no particular skill and can include laborers, porters, maids, and similar workers. Adventurers pay characters to assist them or act on their behalf in variety circumstances. Most such hirelings have fairly ordinary skills, others while are masters of a craft or art, and a few are experts with specialized adventuring skills. Some the basic of most types hirelings appear on the Services table. Other common hirelings include any the variety of people who inhabit typical a front of the duke. For example, wizard might pay a carpenter to construct elaborale chest (and miniature replica) for use in the Leomund's secret spell. A fighter commission blacksmith to forge special sword. A bard might pay a tailor lo make exquisite clothing for an upcoming performance. People who are able to cast spells don't fall into the hirelings category. It might be possible to find other hirelings provide expert dangerous or more services. Mercenary soldiers paid to help the adventurers take on a hobgoblin army are hirelings, as is research ancient esoteric lore. High-level adventurers establish strongholds and common spell someone to cast a relatively easy enough in a city or town, and might cost 10 to 50 pieces of gold (plus cost any expensive material components). Someone hired whole kind, or might agents run place the from castellan steward easy enough in a city or town, and might cost 10 to 50 pieces of gold (plus cost any expensive material components). Menial laborers to keep the stables clean. These often enjoy long-term contract that includes compensation. Finding someone able and willing to cast higher-level spell involves large perhaps with university prominent or one a city, temple. A spellcaster might for ask adventurers can provide, as someone to retrieve rare item from dangerous locale traversing monster-infested wilderness to deliver somelhing important to a distant settlement.
